descriptionInUI: Runtime for the Vietnam Ops suite -- opt-in period air-war mechanics gated by the 'Vietnam Ops' campaign settings page. Inert unless a Vietnam Ops setting is on (the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.VietnamOps only then). Arc Light: a heavy-bomber (B-52) Strike walks a carpet of bombs across its target at the run-in instead of dropping a single aimpoint (tactical strikers unaffected). AAA flak gauntlet: aircraft within range and below the ceiling of an opposing AAA gun draw barrage flak that tightens against predictable run-ins and widens when jinking. Naval gunfire support: offshore gun ships shell shore targets -- a player F10 'Naval Fire Mission' menu fires on the last F10 map marker, and (optionally) ships automatically bombard the nearest in-range enemy ground target each cadence. Coastal campaigns only.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Arc Light carpet length along the run-in (m)
Arc Light carpet width across the run-in (m)
Arc Light per-blast power (kg TNT equivalent)
Arc Light: range from target the bomber releases the carpet (NM)
Flak gauntlet: AAA gun horizontal reach (m)
Flak gauntlet: effective flak ceiling above ground (m)
Flak gauntlet: tightest barrage miss, predictable flight (m)
Flak gauntlet: loosest barrage miss, jinking (m)
Flak gauntlet: per-burst power (small = mostly visual)
Naval gunfire: gun reach for ship/target selection (m)
Naval gunfire: shells per fire mission
Naval gunfire: seconds between automatic fire missions
